Alternative.title: Alternative
Alternative.description: A possible choice or solution in the decision-making process.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the alternative was created.

Criterion.title: Criterion
Criterion.description: A standard or rule by which alternatives are evaluated.

type.description: Whether to maximize or minimize the value of this criterion.

weight.description: Importance weight of the criterion (usually 0 to 1).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the criterion was created.

Evaluation.title: Evaluation
Evaluation.description: The assessment of an alternative based on a specific criterion.

alternative_id.description: ID of the alternative being evaluated.

criterion_id.description: ID of the criterion used for evaluation.

value.description: The numerical value of the evaluation.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the evaluation was last updated.

/evaluations/{evaluationId}.description: Collection of evaluations for alternatives across criteria. Document ID is usually {alternativeId}_{criterionId}.
